description: Style Note A range of perfumes inspired by the sea, nautilus gives you fresh lasting fragrances that you'll love.Product Details Pois Nautilus is a spray perfume for women which comes in a blue glass flask with a light blue top Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 75 mlStyle Note  A range of perfumes inspired by the sea, Nautilus gives you fresh lasting fragrances that you'll love.Product Details  Pois Nautilus is a spray perfume for women which comes in a semi circular container  with a  blue top  Caution  Do not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize  75 ml
